title: GSC UI Indexing Script Fix Report — Phase 21.4
root_cause: GSC persistent profile (google-gsc-v3) has LOST PROPERTY VERIFICATION. The inspect page redirects to /not-verified. URL Inspection is unavailable for unverified properties.
fix_attempted: Updated wait logic: poll up to 45 seconds for 'Request indexing' button
Debugged URL entry: tried evaluate() native setter and keyboard.type()
Discovered: session redirects to /not-verified — property verification expired
conclusion: GSC UI indexing via CloakBrowser requires Qasem to re-verify the property in a non-headless browser session. The persistent profile has lost verification status.
alternative: Pages ARE in sitemap.xml with index/follow. Internal links added. Google will discover them through normal crawl + sitemap. GSC UI indexing request is a speed optimization, not a requirement.
